title: Inline quiz — generation + grading (English + Swedish parity)
description: The quizIntent gate (src/quiz.js) is EN+SV per invariant 6, so the batch tests both languages. A 'quiz me' ask should render the interactive quiz card (sequential questions with alternatives + a free-text field), grade multiple-choice locally, and grade written answers via /api/quiz/grade. The Swedish point guards the parity gate that unit tests can drift on.

points.label: Quiz (English): card renders and grades
points.summary: 'quiz me' with a topic + question count should produce the interactive quiz card, not a prose answer. Answer a couple, submit, and confirm the score/recap comes back. FAIL = a normal text answer instead of the card.

actions.text: Quiz me with 5 questions on the water cycle

points.label: Quiz (Swedish): parity gate fires
points.summary: The Swedish phrasing must trigger the SAME quiz card as English (invariant 6 parity). PASS = the interactive card in Swedish; FAIL = a plain answer, which means the Swedish gate regressed.

actions.text: Förhör mig med 5 frågor om vattnets kretslopp
